'''Vex''' was the personal bodyguard of [[Greezim Trentacal]] and ran the [[Karazak Slavers' Cooperative/Legends|Karazak Slavers Cooperative]] outpost on [[Gabredor III/Legends|Gabredor III]]. He killed a mute [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] girl after she may have killed Greezim and then fought the [[Trunsk]] [[Sully Tigereye]], who tore him to pieces.<ref name="Blaze of Glory" />
